planToolkitBoxBreathingLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: a 4-4-4-4 guided breathing technique the user can link to a craving-plan step.

planToolkitBoxBreathingSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Box Breathing toolkit exercise.

planToolkitGroundingLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: a sensory grounding technique (notice 5 things you see, 4 you hear, etc.).

planToolkitGroundingSub.desc: Sub-label describing the 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding toolkit exercise.

planToolkitCbtReframeLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: a cognitive behavioural therapy thought-reframing exercise.

planToolkitCbtReframeSub.desc: Sub-label describing the CBT Thought Reframe toolkit exercise.

planToolkitAffirmationsLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: reading personal affirmations.

planToolkitAffirmationsSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Affirmations toolkit exercise.

planToolkitColdWaterLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: splashing cold water on the face to interrupt a craving.

planToolkitColdWaterSub.en: Splash cold water on your face
planToolkitColdWaterSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Cold Water toolkit exercise.

planToolkitWalkOutsideLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: taking a short walk outdoors to reset.

planToolkitWalkOutsideSub.en: Take a short walk to reset
planToolkitWalkOutsideSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Walk Outside toolkit exercise.

planToolkitCallSomeoneLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: phoning a sponsor or friend for support.

planToolkitCallSomeoneSub.en: Reach out to your sponsor or a friend
planToolkitCallSomeoneSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Call Someone toolkit exercise.

planToolkitBodyScanLabel.desc: Toolkit exercise name: a body-scan relaxation from toes to head.

planToolkitBodyScanSub.en: Scan from toes to head, release tension
planToolkitBodyScanSub.desc: Sub-label describing the Body Scan toolkit exercise.

planStepHint1.desc: Placeholder hint for the first pre-craving plan step input.

planStepHint2.en: e.g. Drink a glass of cold water
planStepHint2.desc: Placeholder hint for the second pre-craving plan step input.

planStepHint3.desc: Placeholder hint for the third pre-craving plan step input.

planSavedSnack.en: Plan saved — you'll see it when a craving hits.
planSavedSnack.desc: Snackbar confirmation shown after the user saves their pre-craving plan.

planTitle.desc: Screen title for the pre-craving plan screen.

planSubtitle.en: Three things you commit to doing the moment a craving hits — written in calm so you don't have to think in a storm.
planSubtitle.desc: Subtitle on the pre-craving plan screen explaining its purpose.

planLinkExercise.desc: Tappable label that lets the user attach a toolkit exercise to a plan step.

planLinkInfo.en: Linking a Toolkit exercise adds a one-tap "Open" button during your plan so you can jump straight into the exercise.
planLinkInfo.desc: Informational note explaining what linking a toolkit exercise does.

planSavePlan.desc: Button label to save the pre-craving plan when there are unsaved changes.

planSaved.desc: Button label shown after the pre-craving plan has been saved (no unsaved changes).

planPickerTitle.desc: Title of the bottom sheet where the user picks a toolkit exercise to link.

planPickerSubtitle.en: Tap to add a one-tap link to this exercise in your plan.
planPickerSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the toolkit-exercise picker bottom sheet.

planOpensInApp.desc: Small badge indicating that a toolkit exercise opens inside the app (has a route).

planRunnerTitle.desc: Title of the plan-runner sheet shown before logging a craving.

planRunnerSubtitle.en: Run through these before logging. Breathe between each one.
planRunnerSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the plan-runner sheet prompting the user to work through their plan steps.

planRunnerOpenExercise.desc: Tappable label that opens a linked toolkit exercise from a plan step; {label} is the exercise name.

planRunnerImOkay.desc: Button on the plan-runner sheet: the user feels okay and does not need to log the craving.

planRunnerStillLogIt.desc: Button on the plan-runner sheet: continue to the craving-logging flow anyway.
